mapper.select: select * from ( select 'EXPIRING_SOON' as type, case when datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) <= 1 then 'HIGH' else 'MEDIUM' end as priority, '临期批次需要加速流转' as title, concat(p.name, ' 批次 ', b.batch_code, ' 距过期 ', datediff(b.expiration_time, now()), ' 天，可售库存 ', greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0)) as content, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, b.id as batchId, b.batch_code as batchCode, datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) as daysToExpire, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableQuantity, case when datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) <= 1 then '建议立即进入清仓价并置顶展示' else '建议提高曝光并启用临期折扣' end as suggestedAction from inventory_batch b left join product p on b.product_id = p.id where b.status = 1 and b.expiration_time >= now() and datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) <= 3 and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) > 0 union all select 'SOLD_OUT' as type, 'LOW' as priority, '批次已售罄' as title, concat(p.name, ' 批次 ', b.batch_code, ' 已无可售库存') as content, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, b.id as batchId, b.batch_code as batchCode, datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) as daysToExpire, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableQuantity, '建议将批次状态调整为售罄并补充新批次' as suggestedAction from inventory_batch b left join product p on b.product_id = p.id where b.status = 1 and b.stock_quantity <= b.sold_quantity union all select 'OVERSTOCK' as type, 'MEDIUM' as priority, '高库存批次需要运营干预' as title, concat(p.name, ' 批次 ', b.batch_code, ' 可售库存 ', greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0), '，存在滞销风险') as content, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, b.id as batchId, b.batch_code as batchCode, datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) as daysToExpire, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableQuantity, '建议组合促销或下调动态定价规则' as suggestedAction from inventory_batch b left join product p on b.product_id = p.id where b.status = 1 and datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) between 4 and 10 and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) >= 50 ) t order by field(priority, 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW'), daysToExpire asc, availableQuantity desc limit 20
